data.content: Shipment complete. `main` was fast-forwarded to `e7365c04ea7ee99e5554f9544661e0406707de39` and pushed to `origin/main`. Remote GitHub workflows for that commit both succeeded on 2026-04-19: `CI` run `24623695783` finished green in 1m43s and `Coverage Badge` run `24623695781` finished green in 50s. GitHub emitted non-blocking coverage-regression annotations during CI, but the workflow conclusion was success.
